title: Oplonia jamaicensis
taxonomy: Oplonia jamaicensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It belongs to the genus Oplonia, which is a group of plants commonly known as the 'spike-rushes'. Oplonia jamaicensis is native to Jamaica, where it grows in wet environments. The plant is often found in shallow water or along the edges of streams and rivers. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and shared traits with other species within the Commelinaceae family.

preparations: Oplonia jamaicensis preparations have been traditionally used by locals in Jamaica, particularly for its medicinal properties.
